links.context: God has in store for creation (see [[1CO.2:8]]). The angels beheld and worshipped Christ in
Cross ([[1CO.2:8]]), to the restoration and culmination of all things (v. 10). It is the fullness
commentary in [[1CO.2:7]], [[1CO.2:8]] on those who crucified Christ. 18:1-21 St. Gregory sees Bildad's words as being unwittingly directed against the devil. 19:5
